channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 3 com severidade Alta
• 0 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 AI-driven cyber threats forcing rethink of enterprise security, says Elastic CISO - Business Today
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
AI-driven cyber threats forcing rethink of enterprise security, says Elastic CISO. Consulte o link para mais informações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

Sem notícias para seção de Segurança.

────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

💣 Microsoft Teams, Quick Assist Exploited To Deliver Stealthy A0Backdoor - Cyber Press
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft Teams, Quick Assist Exploited To Deliver Stealthy A0Backdoor. Consulte o link para mais informações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5lNzhZOVBWNUFUVm5GOFZMMHRKRnpwNzlEUk1zbTUtVG4wYllxNU5FdEJvTWc2LVVFenJhX0pBUXFZNlZHSFJsalV0Zl96OUdJcGlHakV5U0hlOS0taTNvQjF3?oc=5
 
💣 Don't panic over new Linux exploits: How to check if your PC is affected in under 5 minutes - How-To Geek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Don't panic over new Linux exploits: How to check if your PC is affected in under 5 minutes. Consulte o link para mais informações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxNMDlxUXprSEo0TlMxY0NwaGlXaGZxeGZjVGZtM28xNXVibE5haUFQaFJIRDA0aHFmd1pjMEpuVnl0c3FwVGFicjZMMGpYTnYyN3h5SGlVNUh0TTZrNTNDeG40Sko2dXh2ZlhucWdoWmVoa2VzSTVkdy1KOU13OGs2NURyVXhkcmUwRkxaLVk2cw?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft to Block Windows 11 and Server 2025 Automated Installation After Critical RCE Vulnerability - CybersecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft to Block Windows 11 and Server 2025 Automated Installation After Critical RCE Vulnerability. Consulte o link para mais informações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxPcUR6TUpTNTVQWDlDVVZGNHlTQjlPd1hGdnlHOVNoNmk3czZESnB3RzNKLVFqUFQ0dlNoUm5rX1NWWkN3RGc3WEg3dUNmbU45cHdFX0RuM3VZV2JSdnl2WEU4Y0taZWJSRVBBeVVkNXh4N0UtbjItVUZQOGNtYjVYRU1qYmJXOTA?oc=5
 
📰 Water Security Agency outlook points to below normal runoff in west-central Saskatchewan - WestCentralOnline
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Water Security Agency outlook points to below normal runoff in west-central Saskatchewan. Consulte o link para mais informações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxNZzBfOEVaQ0JySm9pVUtiWkcwWWVLLXdFamNON2w4OHlRVl9XZnFTQkJoQlpWamdwTVNoWG96eVZTenpsYXlYNk4zTHhYRVZDcl9TcGpHV2kzTWtKa196VFc3Z1hOVTNGMW00clZYTUNsNm8xa1JyeVRrMjQxOXplal9iZ3RBa01NMzJPR2Q4ZlpnNHZWeVFjWDJhRjFOaENFVG13cWMwSE5MQi00eVVBUkZMRnlUcW1mRERoSEh6cXJGdTFxN2c?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 15/03/2026 e 16/03/2026.
